predictions.text: Emmett Shear will do something extraordinary next, whatever he does won't be average

dynamics: Solo Shaan episode reflecting on working with Emmett Shear (Twitch founder) after his resignation. Shaan shares 8-9 discrete stories/lessons from their working relationship at Twitch. Narrative-driven, teaching through anecdotes. Shaan was introspective, learning-focused.
frameworks: Birds Fly, Fish Swim, Deals Fall Through: don't get emotionally attached to deals; they naturally collapse
Four Communication Types: (1) FYI/doing this, (2) need approval?, (3) help me decide A vs B, (4) status update on agreed item
What/Why/So What: communication structure - what happened, why it happened, what now
Fierce Nerd: competitive, fully obsessed, deeply personal investment, overconfident, sees themselves as fastest to right answer
Oven Burns Hotter: smarter, harder-working, faster thinking, higher information retention, better at connecting disparate dots
Socratic Method Leadership: ask questions to break down assumptions, don't spoon-feed answers, drive toward truth not your own rightness
Amazon Six-Page Memo: write everything, silent read 15-20 min before discussion, ensures shared context and deep thinking
learnings: Great founders/leaders operate at extremely high pace, cycling through teams and complex problems quickly
Clear communication frameworks (FYI/approval/decision/update) eliminate wasted context-setting time
The best operators in the room are often widely read and can connect dots across unrelated domains
High performers recognize their weaknesses and hire people (coaches, advisors) specifically to tell them uncomfortable truths
Building culture around written thinking (memos, updates) improves decision quality and reduces groupthink
Socratic questioning method surfaces better answers than directive leadership

banger_quotes.quote: Birds fly, fish swim, and deals fall through - that's what they do
His oven burns hotter - he gets to the right answer faster than most people
He only cared about getting things right, not being right
Here's how I want you to frame anything: FYI, approval needed, help decide, or status update

numbers_dropped: Twitch founded 16 years before Shear's resignation (as of 2023)
Emmett read six-page memo in ~7 minutes (faster than entire meeting)
Amazon six-page memo meeting: 15-20 minutes silent reading time
Emmett's executive coach Flo: ~80 years old
notable: Shaan reflects on Twitch founder Emmett Shear's resignation. Detailed breakdown of 8-9 specific leadership and communication practices. Emphasis on being 'fierce nerd,' using Socratic method, and surrounding yourself with truth-tellers. Shaan deeply learned-oriented and admiring.
